channel.title: Red Hat, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Red Hat, Inc. (redhat).

item.title: CVE-2026-2604 · 5.6 MEDIUM — Evolution-data-server: evolution data server: arbitrary file deletion via inconsistent uri handling
item.description: A flaw was found in evolution-data-server. Inconsistent comparison logic in the addressbook file backend allows a Flatpak application with D-Bus access to craft a malicious URI containing directory traversal sequences. This URI is stored without prop…

item.title: CVE-2026-4367 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Libxpm: libxpm: denial of service via out-of-bounds read in xpm file parsing
item.description: A flaw was found in libXpm. A local user with low privileges could exploit an Out-of-Bounds Read vulnerability in the `xpmNextWord()` function by processing a specially crafted or very small XPM (X PixMap) image file. This improper validation of file…

item.title: CVE-2026-10649 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Pacemaker: pacemaker: denial of service via integer overflow in remote message decompression
item.description: A flaw was found in Pacemaker. An unauthenticated remote attacker can exploit an integer overflow vulnerability in the remote message decompression process. By sending a specially crafted compressed remote message before authentication, an attacker c…

item.title: CVE-2026-12398 · 7.5 HIGH — Galaxy_ng: shell injection in legacy role import via unsanitized git ref names
item.description: A command injection vulnerability was found in galaxy_ng. The do_git_checkout() function in the legacy role import API (v1) interpolates unsanitized git ref names (branch/tag names) into shell commands executed via subprocess.run() with shell=True. A…

item.title: CVE-2026-42014 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Gnutls: fix use-after-free in gnutls_pkcs11_token_set_pin
item.description: A flaw was found in GnuTLS. The `gnutls_pkcs11_token_set_pin` function, used for changing the Security Officer PIN, can lead to a use-after-free vulnerability. This occurs when an attacker attempts to change the PIN with a NULL old PIN for a token th…

item.title: CVE-2026-52718 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Gstreamer1-plugins-bad-free: gstreamer: denial of service via av1 tile_list_obu parser byte/bit confusion
item.description: A denial of service vulnerability was found in GStreamer's AV1 codec parser in gst-plugins-bad. The gst_av1_parser_parse_tile_list_obu() function passes a byte count to a bit-reader API that expects a bit count, causing parser desynchronization. A re…

item.title: CVE-2026-52722 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Gstreamer1-plugins-bad-free: gstreamer: signed integer overflow in vmnc decoder cursor payload handling
item.description: A signed integer overflow vulnerability was found in GStreamer's VMnc decoder. A crafted VMnc stream with large cursor dimensions can overflow signed integer payload-size arithmetic, bypassing a length check and leading to out-of-bounds reads. A remo…

item.title: CVE-2026-52720 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Gstreamer1-plugins-bad-free: gstreamer: heap buffer overflow via crafted vnc server rectangle in librfb
item.description: A heap buffer overflow vulnerability was found in GStreamer's librfb (RFB/VNC client). The rectangle bounds check incorrectly validates area rather than individual dimensions, allowing a malicious VNC server to send a rectangle that extends beyond th…

item.title: CVE-2026-53704 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Gstreamer1-plugins-ugly-free: gstreamer: out-of-bounds read in realmedia demuxer fileinfo metadata parser
item.description: A flaw was found in GStreamer's RealMedia demuxer in the gst-plugins-ugly package. When processing a RealMedia file containing a specially crafted FILEINFO metadata section, the demuxer parses variable-name and variable-value pairs using re_skip_pasc…

item.title: CVE-2026-53703 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Gstreamer1-plugins-ugly-free: gstreamer: out-of-bounds read in realmedia demuxer audio stream header parser
item.description: A vulnerability was found in the GStreamer RealMedia demuxer (gst-plugins-ugly). When processing a RealMedia (.rm) file, the demuxer parses MDPR (media properties) chunks to configure audio streams. For audio stream header versions 4 and 5, the parse…

item.title: CVE-2026-52721 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Gstreamer1-plugins-bad-free: gstreamer: multiple out-of-bounds reads in pcapparse ipv4/tcp header parsing
item.description: Multiple out-of-bounds read vulnerabilities were found in GStreamer's pcapparse element. Malformed PCAP records can trigger reads beyond buffer boundaries during IPv4/TCP header parsing. This element is primarily used in debugging pipelines, limiting…

item.title: CVE-2026-53705 · 7.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Gstreamer1-plugins-good: gstreamer: heap buffer overflow in wavpack decoder via integer overflow
item.description: A flaw was found in GStreamer's WavPack audio decoder in gst-plugins-good. When processing a specially crafted WavPack file, an integer overflow in the buffer size calculation (4 * block_samples * channels) in gst_wavpack_dec_handle_frame() causes a…

item.title: CVE-2026-52719 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Gstreamer1-plugins-bad-free: gstreamer: out-of-bounds read via jpeg segment length validation in va decoder
item.description: An out-of-bounds read vulnerability was found in the VA JPEG decoder in GStreamer's gst-plugins-bad. The JPEG parser reads a segment length value from the bitstream without validating it against available data. A remote attacker could trick a user in…

item.title: CVE-2026-44188 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Ansible-lightspeed: ansible lightspeed: session hijacking and unauthorized data access due to insufficient session expiration
item.description: A flaw was found in Ansible Lightspeed. This vulnerability, related to insufficient session expiration, allows a remote attacker to maintain persistent access to the Ansible Lightspeed instance. If an attacker exfiltrates a valid OAuth (Open Authoriz…

item.title: CVE-2026-54231 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Abrt: unsanitized systemd journal content written to dump directory files enables content injection
item.description: A content injection vulnerability was found in the ABRT post-create event handler scripts in libreport. The event script queries the systemd journal for log entries matching the crashed process and writes the results to files in the dump directory wi…

item.title: CVE-2026-54230 · 7 HIGH — Abrt: event handler scripts follow symlinks when writing output files, allowing arbitrary file overwrites
item.description: A symlink following vulnerability was found in the ABRT post-create event handler scripts in libreport. Event scripts write output files using shell redirections without the O_NOFOLLOW flag. If the target file is replaced with a symlink, the shell pr…

item.title: CVE-2026-54229 · 7 HIGH — Abrt: chownproblemdir succeeds during active post-create event processing due to inadequate locking
item.description: A race condition was found in the abrt-dbus D-Bus service's ChownProblemDir method. ChownProblemDir opens the dump directory with DD_OPEN_READONLY and calls dd_chown to change ownership of all files to the caller's uid, succeeding even while post-cre…

item.title: CVE-2026-54228 · 7.8 HIGH — Abrt: toctou race condition in abrt-dbus setelement allows arbitrary file writes to dump directories
item.description: A time-of-check time-of-use (TOCTOU) race condition was found in the abrt-dbus D-Bus service's SetElement method. Between dump directory creation and post-create event execution, any local user can call SetElement to write arbitrary text files into t…

item.title: CVE-2026-48914 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Qemu-kvm: heap buffer overflow in virtio-blk scsi request handling
item.description: A flaw was found in QEMU's virtio-blk device. The issue arises because the device does not properly validate the size of input descriptors before writing data. A malicious guest with high privileges could exploit this vulnerability by submitting a ma…

item.title: CVE-2026-53702 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Gstreamer1-plugins-bad-free: gstreamer: stack buffer overflow in h.265 buffering period sei parser
item.description: A stack buffer overflow flaw was found in the GStreamer H.265 codec parser library (gst-plugins-bad). When parsing a buffering period SEI message, the parser uses an incorrect loop bound derived from cpb_cnt_minus1[i] (the loop index) instead of the…

item.title: CVE-2026-53701 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Gstreamer1-plugins-bad-free: gstreamer: out-of-bounds write in h.266/vvc pps picture partition parser
item.description: An out-of-bounds write vulnerability was found in GStreamer's H.266/VVC PPS picture partition parser in gst-plugins-bad. In the multi-slice-in-tile processing of gst_h266_parser_parse_picture_partition() (gsth266parser.c), the loop iterates without c…

item.title: CVE-2026-11774 · 7.6 HIGH — 389-ds-base: 389-ds-base: integer overflow in sasl packet length bypasses size limit leading to heap buffer overflow
item.description: An integer overflow flaw was found in the SASL I/O layer of 389 Directory Server (389-ds-base). In sasl_io_start_packet(), adding sizeof(uint32_t) to a crafted SASL packet length prefix of 0xFFFFFFFC causes unsigned wraparound to zero, bypassing the…

item.title: CVE-2026-11986 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Keycloak-rest-admin-ui-ext: authorization bypass vulnerability in the admin-ui-ext bulk role-mapping-delete endpoints of keycloak
item.description: A flaw was found in the admin-ui-ext component of Keycloak, which provides extended administrative user interface capabilities. The issue occurs because certain bulk role-removal endpoints fail to perform granular permission checks when deleting role…

item.title: CVE-2026-11850 · 5 MEDIUM — Krb5: krb5: integer underflow in berval2tl_data() leads to heap out-of-bounds read
item.description: An integer underflow vulnerability was found in MIT krb5 in the berval2tl_data() function in plugins/kdb/ldap/libkdb_ldap/ldap_principal2.c. The function performs an unsigned subtraction (bv_len - 2) without a prior bounds check. When bv_len is 0 or…

item.title: CVE-2026-6893 · 8.8 HIGH — Dracut: dracut: root code execution via dhcp options command injection
item.description: A flaw was found in dracut. A remote attacker on the adjacent network can exploit this vulnerability by providing specially crafted DHCP (Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol) options, such as a malicious hostname, to a system using dracut's legacy DH…

item.title: CVE-2026-11884 · 6.5 MEDIUM — 389-ds-base: 389-ds-base: heap buffer overflow in schema objectclass serialization due to missing oc_superior in size calculation
item.description: A heap buffer overflow flaw was found in 389 Directory Server. When serializing objectclass definitions, the oc_superior (SUP) field length is omitted from buffer size calculations in read_schema_dse() and schema_oc_to_string(), but the field is stil…

item.title: CVE-2026-53470 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Migration-planner: getsourcedownloadurl missing organization check
item.description: A flaw was found in migration-planner. An authenticated attacker could exploit an improper access control vulnerability in the `/api/v1/sources/{id}/image-url` endpoint. This flaw allows the attacker to bypass an ownership check and obtain presigned…

item.title: CVE-2026-53476 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Assisted-migration-agent: vddk tarball chained-symlink arbitrary file write
item.description: A flaw was found in assisted-migration-agent. An unauthenticated attacker, located on the same local area network (LAN), can exploit a path traversal vulnerability. By crafting a specially designed gzipped tarball, the attacker can bypass security ch…

item.title: CVE-2026-53475 · 9.3 CRITICAL — Assisted-migration-agent: tls verification disabled on all vcenter connections
item.description: A flaw was found in assisted-migration-agent. The application hardcodes insecure Transport Layer Security (TLS) connections when communicating with vCenter. This vulnerability allows a Man-in-the-Middle (MITM) attacker to intercept and harvest vCente…

item.title: CVE-2026-53471 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Migration-planner: agent api ignores jwt source_id claim
item.description: A flaw was found in migration-planner. The agent-API middleware processes JSON Web Tokens (JWTs) for authentication, but its UpdateSourceInventory and UpdateAgentStatus handlers fail to validate the source_id claim within these tokens against the req…

item.title: CVE-2026-53474 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Migration-planner: second-order sql injection via rvtools upload
item.description: A flaw was found in migration-planner. A remote authenticated attacker could exploit this vulnerability by uploading a specially crafted RVTools .xlsx file. Due to improper input sanitization, malicious SQL embedded within a spreadsheet cell is execu…

item.title: CVE-2026-53473 · 7.3 HIGH — Migration-planner-ui-app: stored xss via javascript: url in agent credential link
item.description: A flaw was found in migration-planner-ui-app. An attacker can register a malicious discovery agent with a specially crafted credentialUrl containing JavaScript code. When an organizational user clicks this link in the user interface, the embedded mal…

item.title: CVE-2026-53469 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Migration-planner: unprotected delete endpoint wipes all tenant data
item.description: A flaw was found in migration-planner. An authenticated user can exploit this vulnerability by sending a DELETE request to the /api/v1/sources route, which lacks proper authorization and filtering. This allows for the destruction of all customer data…

item.title: CVE-2026-11837 · 7.3 HIGH — Ansible-collection-ansible-posix: ansible.posix authorized_key: local privilege escalation via symlink-following chown
item.description: A local privilege escalation vulnerability was found in the ansible.posix authorized_key module. The module's keyfile() function uses os.chown() instead of os.lchown() and opens files without O_NOFOLLOW when managing SSH authorized keys. An unprivile…

item.title: CVE-2026-11789 · 4.9 MEDIUM — 389-ds-base: 389-ds-base: smd5 password storage plugin salt length integer underflow crash
item.description: A flaw was found in 389 Directory Server. The SMD5 password storage plugin performs unsigned integer underflow when computing salt length from a crafted password hash shorter than 16 bytes, causing a buffer over-read that crashes the LDAP server duri…

item.title: CVE-2026-11787 · 5 MEDIUM — 389-ds-base: 389-ds-base: heap buffer over-read in ldap_utf8prev() via str2simple filter parsing
item.description: A flaw was found in 389 Directory Server. The ldap_utf8prev() function reads bytes before the start of a buffer without bounds checking, causing a heap buffer over-read in string filter parsing that may influence internal filter processing behavior.

item.title: CVE-2026-52902 · 4.7 MEDIUM — Awxkit: path traversal via yaml !include directive
item.description: A path traversal vulnerability was found in awxkit, the CLI tool for AWX. The YAML !include directive does not sanitize file paths, allowing an attacker to craft a malicious YAML file that reads arbitrary YAML-formatted files from the local filesyste…

item.title: CVE-2026-11577 · 7.2 HIGH — Keycloak: keycloak: privilege escalation via partialimport fgap permission bypass
item.description: A flaw was found in Keycloak. A limited administrator can exploit an improper access control vulnerability in the POST /admin/realms/{realm}/partialImport endpoint. This allows them to bypass Fine-Grained Admin Permissions (FGAP) and escalate their p…

item.title: CVE-2026-11569 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Quay: quay: stored xss via filedrop svg upload
item.description: A flaw was found in Quay. The filedrop endpoint accepts any mime type without validation, allowing an authenticated user with repository write access to upload a malicious SVG file containing JavaScript. The file is stored and served inline through t…

item.title: CVE-2026-3238 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Samba: denial of service against ad dc wins server
item.description: A flaw was found in Samba’s WINS server component when running as an Active Directory Domain Controller. The WINS protocol handlers for certain request types did not properly validate incoming packets, allowing an unauthenticated remote attacker to t…

item.title: CVE-2026-50263 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Xorg-x11-server: xorg-x11-server-xwayland: xorg-x11-server: use-after-free information disclosure in createsaverwindow()
item.description: A use-after-free flaw was found in the X.Org X server and Xwayland in CreateSaverWindow(). A client can trigger a use-after-free read after changing window attributes and forcing the screen saver, leading to information disclosure.

item.title: CVE-2026-50264 · 7.8 HIGH — Xorg-x11-server: xorg-x11-server-xwayland: xorg-x11-server: out-of-bounds heap write in dri2 drigetbuffers/drigetbufferswithformat
item.description: An out-of-bounds write flaw was found in the X.Org X server and Xwayland in DRIGetBuffers/DRIGetBuffersWithFormat. A client that requests multiple DRI2BufferBackLeft attachments and one DRI2BufferFrontLeft can trigger an out-of-bounds heap write. Thi…

item.title: CVE-2026-50261 · 7.8 HIGH — Xorg-x11-server: xorg-x11-server-xwayland: xorg-x11-server: use-after-free in syncchangecounter()
item.description: A use-after-free flaw was found in the X.Org X server and Xwayland in SyncChangeCounter(). A client that sets up multiple SyncCounters can trigger a use-after-free when destroying those counters via a second client connection while changing those cou…

item.title: CVE-2026-50260 · 7.8 HIGH — Xorg-x11-server: xorg-x11-server-xwayland: xorg-x11-server: use-after-free in freecounter()
item.description: A use-after-free flaw was found in the X.Org X server and Xwayland in FreeCounter(). A client that sets up multiple SyncCounters and awaits on those triggers can trigger a use-after-free when destroying those counters via a second client connection.…

item.title: CVE-2026-50258 · 7.8 HIGH — Xorg-x11-server: xorg-x11-server-xwayland: xorg-x11-server: stack buffer overflow in xkb key types due to unchecked shift levels
item.description: A stack-based buffer overflow flaw was found in the X.Org X server and Xwayland. The X server has multiple stack buffers sized XkbMaxShiftLevel * XkbNumKbdGroups but CheckKeyTypes() does not verify or clamp non-canonical key types to XkbMaxShiftLevel…

item.title: CVE-2026-50259 · 7.8 HIGH — Xorg-x11-server: xorg-x11-server-xwayland: xorg-x11-server: stack buffer overflow in xkb setmap request via mapwidths indexing
item.description: A stack-based buffer overflow flaw was found in the X.Org X server and Xwayland. _XkbSetMapChecks() declares a fixed-size stack buffer mapWidths[256] indexed by key type index. The helper function CheckKeyTypes() writes to this buffer at a client-con…

item.title: CVE-2026-50256 · 7.8 HIGH — Xorg-x11-server: xorg-x11-server-xwayland: xorg-x11-server: stack buffer overflow in font alias resolution due to libxfont2 name length mismatch
item.description: A stack-based buffer overflow flaw was found in the X.Org X server and Xwayland. A mismatch between the X server and the libXfont2 library's maximum font name length can cause a stack buffer overflow during font alias resolution. The server allocates…

item.title: CVE-2026-50257 · 7.8 HIGH — Xorg-x11-server: xorg-x11-server-xwayland: xorg-x11-server: use-after-free in misyncdestroyfence()
item.description: A use-after-free flaw was found in the X.Org X server and Xwayland in miSyncDestroyFence(). A client that sets up multiple fence triggers can trigger a use-after-free function pointer call. An attacker would connect to the X server to set up a fence…

item.title: CVE-2026-50265 · 7 HIGH — Libinput: local privilege escalation via crafted uinput devices
item.description: A flaw was found in libinput. A local attacker with access to /dev/uinput can inject arbitrary udev properties through the libinput-device-group helper. This injection can lead to root code execution, for example, by exploiting REMOVE_CMD properties…

item.title: CVE-2026-11332 · 7.8 HIGH — Ansible-core: argument injection in ansible-galaxy role install leads to arbitrary code execution
item.description: A flaw was found in ansible-core. The ansible-galaxy role install command processes dependency specifications from a role's meta/requirements.yml file. Due to improper neutralization of argument delimiters, a malicious role author can inject arbitrar…
